name: rss-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) submissions: venue fit and the ICRA/IROS/RSS/CoRL routing calendar, OpenReview submission audits, the invited one-page rebuttal, real-robot evidence and reproducibility, supplementary video packaging, camera-ready for the free roboticsproceedings.org archive, and conference-week planning. Grounded in the RSS 2026 (Sydney) CFP, review-process page, OpenReview group, and roboticsproceedings.org, checked on 2026-07-08.
